title: pteridium aquilinum subsp. pinetorum
intro: Pteridium aquilinum subsp. pinetorum, also known as the bristly brake, is a subspecies of the fern plant Pteridium aquilinum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off free radicals. The bristly brake has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea, tincture, or capsule form to take advantage of its health benefits and medicinal properties.
